_note: Weekly net fund flows (in $B) for the underlying vehicle that represents each asset class. Cash = ICI weekly money market fund total asset change (not an ETF). Commodities, IG, and Treasuries have no clean ETF flow proxy in this scope. Only the most recent week's MMF, GLD, BTC, and SPY-complex numbers are directly confirmed from published weekly reports — earlier-week numbers are derived from reported monthly/YTD/5-day aggregates and should be treated as directional.
